title: Lyrics Widget — Synced Spotify Lyrics on Your Windows Desktop
meta_desc: A compact, always-on-top desktop widget that shows your current Spotify track and synced lyrics. Windows 11 · free & open source · one-click installer.
og_title: Lyrics Widget — Synced Spotify Lyrics on Your Desktop
og_desc: See the current track, synced lyrics, and playback progress right on top of your desktop. Windows 11 · free & open source.
hero_sub: A one-click Windows installer, three widget sizes, and a rock-solid taskbar controller.
show_p: The current track, line-by-line synced lyrics, and playback progress — right on top of your desktop.
demo_lines: Neon slowly wakes outside the window
The corner breeze still hums that song
I set the whole city to mute
Just the melody walking me through the night
f1_p: Aligned to Spotify's playback every second — the current line lights up as it's sung, shown in up to two clean lines.
f2_p: Pinned above every window and freely draggable to any corner — no switching back to the Spotify app.
f3_p: Lives in the Windows taskbar and system tray, so you can run, show, hide, or close the widget anytime.
w1_p: A single OAuth PKCE authorization securely grants playback access, with tokens refreshed automatically.
w2_p: Polls currently-playing every second to track the title, artist, and live playback progress.
w3_p: Matches the timeline to light up each line as it plays; Chinese fallback lyrics are converted to Traditional Chinese automatically.
src_lrclib_p: The primary source for high-quality synced LRC lyrics, with precise timeline alignment.
src_netease_p: Automatically fills in when the primary source comes up empty; Chinese lyrics are converted to Traditional Chinese, so even lesser-known tracks get words.
src_footnote: Built with Python · PyQt6 · Open source · 282 automated tests passing
dl_p: Download the Windows installer for a one-click setup that adds a Start Menu shortcut automatically.
dl_note: Windows 11 · Settings and tokens stay on your PC · Preserved across reinstalls
s1_p: Open SpotifyLyricsWidget from the Start Menu.
s2_p: Follow the Spotify setup window to create your own app and paste in the Client ID.
s3_p: Click Agree in your browser and lyrics start syncing right away.
footer_disclaimer: An unofficial project, not affiliated with Spotify AB · © 2026
